Happy holidays, friend! To celebrate the holidays and have a little fun, we’re starting the 12 Days of Tom — a way to look at the past, present, and future of this campaign! We’re starting at number twelve and it’s...[ _**12 year term limits.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU2guMDNglnnnpbM9OejMre204mPgqAEiXPPxW6BrruzgysYl0S4dJ15oKvrx0rfCjbQakBt-2FA-2BZjejDfQyz9hZOXt8zKODoDCPxyMAG6EDzUZTZKnI-2BlllUeu-2Fd1OB1hfJuXA3Kn9Nde70OTfDZRTkVEyUWT63EUPY-2FvvGIWr-2BhqjTW1bO4BJnS-2F-2Bkcofvli-2FaZui26gPOJIMgrtglkxLC_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFc5RfHVvXNxDbPCjfMlEC-2FcII1Lo7Uq7-2Fkd7pqWrsnqnftvNcCh-2BFnzHtXlgNz1FCVlxXu6Tr7gV7hVqH5wqOcEgQrJEx3WcVjB4km6JtzztOJnd2c8AfFtMtdibOy42UOkKJTcue8RS86VgKfVisit6OAOkSt3ZXls-2BHTZQG1l6yq2leRmyE5JFY6s0lcpkg5awQb3hEuJmnvfYJoZgXA5EdXpq6kZJUvNgpiY6zRr3buShtH-2FPY6BPFtUUXKLYY6HeEPV-2BqtljpQfKqjKi-2Fee9q0oSKCTjKOug8Jxw3JIYPkyFVBhoPRkzgd3cB8P4cLUIO7wXrE0pRg9bC9ZqAgSrY2GXV-2F2mpn5nsIdyw7m5w-3D-3D)
---
“Congress shouldn’t be a lifetime appointment. Our representatives should be held accountable to the American people — and not to the corporate interests who put them in office. When we bring in new people to Congress, we see more young people, more women, more people of color. We need new blood, and the way we get that is with term limits.” — Tom

---
Let’s send Mitch McConnell, Lindsay Graham, and Chuck Grassley a message: It’s time for a change. Term limits will make Congress more representative of America and bring in new ideas to replace career politicians in the pocket of corporate lobbyists. **If you agree with the majority of Americans who support term limits, add your name to stand with Tom:**

Tom has been organizing grassroots campaigns to take on corporate influence and corruption in government for the past ten years. During the process, it has become clear that our government is broken — and that it needs serious structural reform. [_**It’s time to replace the corporate puppets in Washington with a fresh and diverse group who actually represent America — add your name to support term limits!**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU2guMDNglnnnpbM9OejMre204mPgqAEiXPPxW6BrruzgysYl0S4dJ15oKvrx0rfCjbQakBt-2FA-2BZjejDfQyz9hZOXt8zKODoDCPxyMAG6EDzUZTZKnI-2BlllUeu-2Fd1OB1hfJuXA3Kn9Nde70OTfDZRTkVEyUWT63EUPY-2FvvGIWr-2BhqjTW1bO4BJnS-2F-2Bkcofvli-2FaZui26gPOJIMgrtglkxLC_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFc5RfHVvXNxDbPCjfMlEC-2FcII1Lo7Uq7-2Fkd7pqWrsnqnftvNcCh-2BFnzHtXlgNz1FCVlxXu6Tr7gV7hVqH5wqOcEgQrJEx3WcVjB4km6JtzztOJnd2c8AfFtMtdibOy42UOthWOHu7DVRXTAerbBSw-2BZyPJxYwRTVTWCeLN5e8o4RlI2G-2BnUqWnI-2BXk7GDigb34S5-2FBrxFzbjG7sJv7lYlMlf-2F7DyE2MPRrMEdt5c4OXYRHJFRdiDHMKRSoWI44zO0d9NLZnYYKGApZee18TMM6wzT6G5Ta7oq-2FBlUl9HJ4VK-2BspZgSEwATacDu4RoskzDg-2FA-2FU6Z9Ee9xa9-2FUcURJrr6gCIjwESIe3FNaLvMHjO2A-3D-3D) Check back tomorrow and see what’s next, friend! Friend: [In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba914/134673f2/9124f23/69978a31/965276937/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I crunched the numbers with my finance team, and we've got some work to do.

[We've gotten on more than a dozen state ballots, opened new offices, and hired more field staff, but we need to raise another $30,000 by Sunday night if we're going to keep building at the pace we need to win!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba914/134673f2/9124f23/69978a32/965276937/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

While some top-tier candidates have started to burn out after months or even years in the spotlight, I'm in this for the long haul.

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

**Making your first donation today would make a huge impact. Any a[mount you donate today will help us reach this crucial goal. Team, I'm asking, will you chip in today? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba914/134673f2/9124f23/69978a31/965276937/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")**

If we do, we can continue hiring new organizers and building our movement to reach out to the 70% of Democrats who haven't made up their mind yet about who they are supporting in this primary.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: This is a new phase of the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4726%2E377263%2E_uAVr3) Yang Gang --

This is a new phase of the campaign.

We are no longer a long shot, we are one of the top contenders.

That comes with higher expectations from everyone watching. And the first test is this $2 million goal that’s public on our website right now. **If we fall short, it would send a bad sign to the establishment and media that this campaign doesn’t have what it takes to be in it for the long haul.

[If every single person reading this pitches in, we will hit our $2 million goal by Sunday. I need you now, Yang Gang. The only way to hit this goal and win this campaign is to do it together. Please pitch in now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19731?t=5&akid=4726%2E377263%2E_uAVr3)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19731?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4726%2E377263%2E_uAVr3)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19731?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4726%2E377263%2E_uAVr3)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19731?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4726%2E377263%2E_uAVr3)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19731?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4726%2E377263%2E_uAVr3)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19731?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4726%2E377263%2E_uAVr3)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19731?t=8&amount=25&akid=4726%2E377263%2E_uAVr3)
---
Don’t forget what we’re fighting for here.

If you want to rewrite the rules of our economy to work for us, expand healthcare to all, and build a wave of change that sweeps through Washington, then now is the time to act.

**[There are just two days left to hit our goal. Pitch in and let’s make it happen together.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19731?t=7&akid=4726%2E377263%2E_uAVr3)**

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Pitch IN](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19731?t=6&akid=4726%2E377263%2E_uAVr3)
---

name: Booker HQ
subject: 72 hours to add your name to our new (moving!) donor wall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Your name could be on it. Team, My name is Mike Frosolone. I'm Cory's state director out here in Iowa. I'd like to share something with you that I think is pretty cool. First, here's a quick update on what's been happening on the ground. The enthusiasm for Cory in Iowa has been off the charts. Last weekend, we welcomed Cory back to Iowa for a whirlwind of a trip that took him to 12 different counties in only four days. **Over those few days, we received so many new supporters that we actually ran out of commit-to-caucus cards!** We're excited that Cory will be coming back to Iowa again very soon. And this time, he'll have a slick new ride as we travel around the state. Check out this brand new bus that Cory will be riding around in when he's back in a few days: [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-bus-donor-wall?refcode=em_fr_20191213_BHQ_20191213-fr-BHQ-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **It looks awesome, right? Well, your name could be on it.[If you donate by Monday, December 16th at 8:00 p.m., we'll put your name on the bus. It's the least we can do to recognize our biggest supporters.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-bus-donor-wall?refcode=em_fr_20191213_BHQ_20191213-fr-BHQ-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory hasn't seen the bus yet, but I can't wait for the look on his face when he's able to see it for the first time. **Will he see your name on the bus when he 's back here in Iowa? [Chip in now to secure your spot on Cory's new ride.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-bus-donor-wall?refcode=em_fr_20191213_BHQ_20191213-fr-BHQ-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for being on this team. Mike Mike Frosolone
Iowa State Director
Cory for Iowa [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-bus-donor-wall?refcode=em_fr_20191213_BHQ_20191213-fr-BHQ-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c15/5fca0d19/78256210/291c9dfd/4034443550/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c15/5fca0d19/78256210/291c9dfc/4034443550/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c15/5fca0d19/78256210/291c9dfb/4034443550/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c15/5fca0d19/78256210/291c9dfa/4034443550/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c15/5fca0d19/78256210/291c9df9/4034443550/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c15/5fca0d19/78256210/291c9dfd/4034443550/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Ryan Furlong
subject: Donald Trump will be coming back to Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Our team is a bit off track for our most important FEC deadline of the year, and I want to tell you why that matters.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191213-three?refcode=em191213-three&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Folks, we're a bit off track for our most important FEC deadline of the year, and here's why that matters:

1\. **Donald Trump's team in Minnesota will be increasing in size** over the next two weeks. He lost our state by just 1.5 points in 2016 -- so he's going _all out_ to win this time around.

2\. Minnesota is one of five states to have Trump's event staff on the ground, which means **Trump and Mike Pence will be coming back to our state** _a lot_ over the next year.

3\. **Trump already endorsed our opponent** , Jason Lewis, and Trump's Victory team will be working for him too. That could spell bad news for our campaign.

Here's the truth: if we're going to keep Minnesota blue in 2020, we need to hit every single grassroots fundraising goal from here on out to compete with Trump and his cronies.

**So, I'm reaching out to ask if you'll donate today to meet our ambitious $25,000 goal before this Monday. clean_body: Our team is a bit off track for our most important FEC deadline of the year, and I want to tell you why that matters. | "" Folks, we're a bit off track for our most important FEC deadline of the year, and here's why that matters: 1\. Donald Trump's team in Minnesota will be increasing in size over the next two weeks. He lost our state by just 1.5 points in 2016 -- so he's going all out to win this time around. 2\. Minnesota is one of five states to have Trump's event staff on the ground, which means Trump and Mike Pence will be coming back to our state a lot over the next year. 3\. Trump already endorsed our opponent , Jason Lewis, and Trump's Victory team will be working for him too. That could spell bad news for our campaign. Here's the truth: if we're going to keep Minnesota blue in 2020, we need to hit every single grassroots fundraising goal from here on out to compete with Trump and his cronies. So, I'm reaching out to ask if you'll donate today to meet our ambitious $25,000 goal before this Monday. Your donation will go toward building a successful campaign and help make sure Trump doesn't get his way: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" Hitting our fundraising goal is critical to building the organization we need across Minnesota if we're going to take on the unprecedented attacks we will face from Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the rest of the Republican party. That's why your donation matters so much today. Thanks. -- Ryan Ryan Furlong Campaign Manager Tina for Minnesota

| | **It 's been said that there are two types of candidates: ones who want to get elected to be something, and the ones who want to get elected to do something. ** The first is easier and too common. These are the candidates who strictly follow polls and listen to consultants to do what's most popular. **Then there are campaigns like this one that stick to their morals,** stand up for the most vulnerable, speak out on tough issues, and put forward plans that would fundamentally overhaul our health care, immigration, education, and housing systems. [Donate Today](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8b5/3eb3e2fc/697f4956/744eef3d/3305557151/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Donate+Today&utm_campaign=20191213_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191213_em_fr_b3_castro_all") **We 've chosen to do what's hard.** We're going to work day in and day out to make sure we leave no one behind, and build toward a future where everyone counts. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8b5/3eb3e2fc/697f4956/744eef22/3305557151/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191213_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191213_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8b5/3eb3e2fc/697f4956/744eef21/3305557151/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191213_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191213_em_fr_b3_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8b5/3eb3e2fc/697f4956/744eef20/3305557151/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191213_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191213_em_fr_b3_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Stand with labor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend: Union workers with UNITE HERE Local 11 announced today that they will go on strike Thursday, December 19 at Loyola Marymount University — the venue for the December Democratic debate — if they cannot reach a fair union contract. **I stand with these workers in their fight for fair wages and benefits — I will not cross their picket line. Add your name to stand with Local 11 in the fight against corporate greed and inhumane working conditions.**
---
| [Stand with unions](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BWV-2BIVr5eHA5UUoTvm3pXiI3HQxQkz1Rrv6OKeHK3YkLDcAaMUPHkXFi3jpxnOOL6xsD1KCJfqcVsL3UTZfqukGWFKIp4V1ga03JBjOWtgGXgvdPq1cjsg6CNYiR8OUoYJtGx8SBfmYdsuTARAJMrDS1PMBZZpIgmr5cIQCJHJteHnh1k9HVsBf5yeehny3R-2Fg-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFc-2FzfFNnMpj44ttCjy1mZnC-2FdO3t59QN5AVlBv0V6IreOg-2F0mVss6W4lyGWdasMPMLsdCDZaLFBdHyd-2Fu3MNzGO5mbNcPYBMjA-2BiyWWgjErOsPiYuuo-2B-2BM7OqzxyFMQ59AtHQ4OF6EF1PqUh2i-2BkJAXeTKIWVGgEjkxvxxtSzAYzD9yu3wcmPc3BUyLN5RlO6BPZIfOlkoID6SZAtW7jwOLd7-2FyQScOmyChry5BYQqXSKdWCXU5d8gMIWc-2BzBD-2BrXsu5GaXV2hqEGTyGDlxzMaZB2YS-2FOfwUOXp7DPUNVZU7aZAYCeZJ8hx-2Fzv1g8YXPPCIsVGDwKbKL2zYnn-2Frl7Ks)

When I organized my first grassroots movement over 10 years ago, my first and best partner was organized labor — and it still is to this day. The workers on strike are standing up and fighting for each other, for their families, and for their communities. They’re saying enough is enough and that it’s time for a fair, livable wage. I trust that the Democratic National Committee will find a solution ahead of the debate, but there has never been a doubt in my mind on who this campaign is for — it’s workers. [_**Join me and add your name to demand workers’ rights.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BWV-2BIVr5eHA5UUoTvm3pXiI3HQxQkz1Rrv6OKeHK3YkLDcAaMUPHkXFi3jpxnOOL6xsD1KCJfqcVsL3UTZfqukGWFKIp4V1ga03JBjOWtgGXgvdPq1cjsg6CNYiR8OUoYJtGx8SBfmYdsuTARAJMrDS1PMBZZpIgmr5cIQCJHJteHnh1k9HVsBf5yeehny3R-2Fg-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFc-2FzfFNnMpj44ttCjy1mZnC-2FdO3t59QN5AVlBv0V6IreOg-2F0mVss6W4lyGWdasMPMLsdCDZaLFBdHyd-2Fu3MNzGO5mbNcPYBMjA-2BiyWWgjErOsPiYuuo-2B-2BM7OqzxyFMQ59Axq52Zv1cgGR4VuFwuNPV7GuKoBV-2FAcOwnyT9CMtZEXP6gqI6P9-2FZL4fJKesH8DwVmFtNQf-2BXCD5CNzI0RrBlW-2FNYPrbwEg4ynICbS9MKlyzOC-2BmRSgrvGIVeJhA2vQzyE7Z0YldfLYb6-2BzxrwWJiqwLkyPbHO-2F8DDP-2BEDu1UsJNRkh3kg-2FhHhg4TSiAjBuUmk6vyxdGVqSy8dBRID07uU) Thank you to UNITE HERE Local 11 — and every union fighting for livable wages — for being tireless champions of the people. In solidarity,
Tom

clean_body: | | | | Friend: Union workers with UNITE HERE Local 11 announced today that they will go on strike Thursday, December 19 at Loyola Marymount University — the venue for the December Democratic debate — if they cannot reach a fair union contract. I stand with these workers in their fight for fair wages and benefits — I will not cross their picket line. Add your name to stand with Local 11 in the fight against corporate greed and inhumane working conditions. | When I organized my first grassroots movement over 10 years ago, my first and best partner was organized labor — and it still is to this day. The workers on strike are standing up and fighting for each other, for their families, and for their communities. They’re saying enough is enough and that it’s time for a fair, livable wage. I trust that the Democratic National Committee will find a solution ahead of the debate, but there has never been a doubt in my mind on who this campaign is for — it’s workers. Thank you to UNITE HERE Local 11 — and every union fighting for livable wages — for being tireless champions of the people. In solidarity, Tom | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering, . name: Peter Khalil
subject: Constituent comments...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peter Khalil
body:
| | | | Wanna change this culture?
---
---
**—**
In response to our last email, James Preston writes, "As one Stanford Grad to another you are a lying commie rat." He continues, "Believe it or not, as late as 39 years ago a deplorable flag waiving [sic] conservative was about to graduate from Stanford. Today it is just you SKE soyboys."
This is the culture we live in now: a culture where even a graduate of one of America's top law schools isn't above childish ad-hominem attacks.
Want to change this culture? name: Congressman Al Green
subject: This email is about Sandy Hook
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress |
body:
Folks,

On this day seven years ago, we saw the depths of depravity when a gunman murdered 20 children and 6 educators at Sandy Hook Elementary School.

Today, I carry in my heart those we lost and also carry the knowledge that as lawmakers, we are not doing everything we can to prevent tragedies like Sandy Hook.

It’s time to prioritize the lives and safety of children, who deserve to feel safe at school. It’s time to institute universal background checks, red flag laws, and assault weapon legislation to keep deadly weapons out of the hands of those who wish to cause harm.

We owe it to those 26 innocent souls, their families, and their communities to prevent the next tragedy before it happens. Thank you for standing with me in the fight for a safer and better future.

With a heavy but hopeful heart,

Congressman Al Green

Keep Al Green in Congress
P.O. Box 56761
Houston TX 77256-6761 United States

--------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress |
--------------------------------------------------------------

subject: Leave the First Family a note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Wish the First Family a MERRY CHRISTMAS. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bdef2708fd1dfbbbbc34435bf462c651956edadfcda5cfb7b6f90f9594041cf6376e9d495d22186fc0aabbd686b8ff9f10435bf40724feb3)
---

Friend,

We noticed you haven't signed the _**Official First Family Christmas Card**_ yet.

It's the most wonderful time of the year, and we know the First Family would be excited to get a personalized note from one of their best supporters, like YOU.

President Trump and Melania loved reading all the kind messages written in the Christmas Card last year, and this year they've asked if they'd be receiving a message from Friend.

We've set a HUGE goal this year of getting _**2 MILLION AMERICANS**_ from all over the country to sign their **_Official Christmas Card,_** and we know you don't want to disappoint them.

**[Please sign the Official First Family Christmas Card TODAY and leave a personalized note for them to read.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bdef2708fd1dfbbb6af40592cd8c7203aa2ea50170f3c1d5ff0b337e417d48eb798bca9f3de77bbdaf93f6998f74975bb28a40b6c095f7c3)**

A personal message from Patriots like YOU really means a lot to President Trump and his family. Here are a few of their favorites from last year:
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bdef2708fd1dfbbb98bce4c672bdc275149ace18c3a287801c71ebe22bb365f9ba7038e4923930bfb31b5777557bcfa3bd6436e58f7d3551)
Remember, this is the **ONLY Official Christmas Card for the First Family.** We're giving it to them on December 25th so make sure you sign it before December 24th at 11:59 PM.

**[Please add your name and a personalized note to the ONLY Official First Family Christmas Card before December 24th at 11:59 PM to wish them a Merry Christmas.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bdef2708fd1dfbbb2a1781f2f3eec0a4157759a46a996016ba630e949c36b979399f1d113f260d6078408b2212b6bd372dd1f36683ddcd50)**

Thank you,

Team Trump 2020
[SIGN THE CARD NOW >>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bdef2708fd1dfbbb1da7e719c207afd0f0c5f0d9ce35b92dea17a4e9801fb2173badfb6420f8d4ffefbbb81eea885e61cd5e24b1608ee665)

| | Hi Peter!

Some good news today: we're off to a great start on our Team MJ Membership Drive. We set a big goal of reaching 25,000 individual donors before our mid-month deadline on December 16 -- and **we just need 773 more supporters to pitch in and make it happen!**

Right now, if you chip in $5 or more, we'll send you an MJ for Texas bumper sticker!* **[Donate now to be one of the very first to get one>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fc/7f51f7bc/4a682347/4ef0ead9/748372987/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191214.1nd__627__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fc/7f51f7bc/4a682347/4ef0ead9/748372987/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191214.1nd__627__&amount=10&recurring=true")

Stick it on your car, your laptop, or give it to a friend -- you decide! We just want to thank you for being a part of this campaign to build a Texas that works for the _people_ , not the special interests. We can't do it without you!

\-- Team MJ

_*Donations made via a different email or channel will not qualify for a sticker. Limit one free sticker per donor during December 2019. A minimum $5 donation must be made by December 19th in order to receive a sticker._

clean_body: Some good news today: we're off to a great start on our Team MJ Membership Drive. | "" | | Hi Peter! Some good news today: we're off to a great start on our Team MJ Membership Drive. We set a big goal of reaching 25,000 individual donors before our mid-month deadline on December 16 -- and we just need 773 more supporters to pitch in and make it happen! Right now, if you chip in $5 or more, we'll send you an MJ for Texas bumper sticker! "" | "" Stick it on your car, your laptop, or give it to a friend -- you decide! We just want to thank you for being a part of this campaign to build a Texas that works for the people , not the special interests. We can't do it without you! \-- Team MJ Donations made via a different email or channel will not qualify for a sticker. Limit one free sticker per donor during December 2019. A minimum $5 donation must be made by December 19th in order to receive a sticker. "" | MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. | | Ever wished you could spend a few minutes talking with Joe? **Well, this is your chance to do a live facetime or video chat with Joe, hang out for a half hour, and get to know each other.** Good conversations with good people are what fuels his fight in this race -- learning about the challenges you face, the hopes you and your family have, and the leadership you expect from a U.S. Senator. **If you're lucky, Ellie or James might even wander into the frame!** They've got a lot of thoughts on important issues like how many bedtime stories their dad should read them every night and whether gingerbread cookies are an acceptable main course for dinner. So here's what you do: **[Donate any amount to be automatically entered for a chance to win your very own live video chat with Joe.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639091e/55b66746/2d76c2d2/80f06fc/3638155801/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/facetime-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-14-facetime&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") **He's excited to talk. name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi?=
subject: Medicare For All, Comedy Show, Potluck & House Party!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI SLOAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Join us for some exciting events starting tonight - we'd love to see you. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3a5c1ee0f13c/medicare-for-all-comedy-show-potluck-house-party?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=b1ef705936&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | , We know you’re in this fight with us, and it’s a huge fight. We don’t organize to win a Green New Deal, justice system reform, or more power in our homes because it’s easy, we do it because our lives depend on it. **But building a movement is deeply fulfilling work and can be a lot of fun too!** We want to invite you to some upcoming events that are about bringing people together - to fight, and to build community as we build the political revolution in Texas.
---
| [ House Party For Heidi](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=2d96066374&e=c169cb0a8e " House Party For Heidi")
---
| **Saturday Dec. 14 from 6-8pm @ 1708 Harvey St Apt A** Some friends of the campaign have organized a house party fundraiser for Heidi! Come meet some other supporters, talk politics, and celebrate another kickass week of organizing to build the political revolution in Texas.
---
| [Medicare For All & How We Win It](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=d5f1b0803d&e=c169cb0a8e "Medicare For All & How We Win It")
---
| **Sunday Dec. 15 from 1-4pm @ The North Door** A panel discussion featuring Tim Faust, Sofia Sepulveda, and Louis Malfaro about what M4A is, why we need it, who is standing in our way, and how we beat them.
---
| [ Progressive Potluck: CHANGE](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=f431001ded&e=c169cb0a8e " Progressive Potluck: CHANGE")
---
| **Sunday Dec. 15 from 6-9:30pm @ 6104 N Hampton Dr** A potluck and moderated discussion about change. We’ll be exploring change at both the individual level and at the societal level, so come by and converse over dinner!
---
| [ Ha Ha For Heidi](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=c264a4c030&e=c169cb0a8e " Ha Ha For Heidi")
---
| **Tuesday Dec. 17 from 8-11pm @ Mohawk Austin** A comedy fundraiser ($5 at the door) for our campaign featuring Chris Cubas, Brett Vervoort, Hunter Duncan, Pat Dean, Roxy Castillo, Adam Hrabik, and Kandace Medina.
---
| **We hope you’ll get some friends together and join us.** It's going to take all of us to beat used car salesman & Red Scare alarmist Roger Williams, and we’d love to have you on our side in this fight. In solidarity,

Team Heidi
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=8f73576340&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=f598b5c920&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=48f63ca52a&e=c169cb0a8e)
---

---

---

Heidi Sloan for Congress

Austin, TX 78762-6034

name: BFA
subject: Morning news update (some good, some bad)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team, there's some good news and some bad news:

The Good News: Yesterday we announced our $3O,OOO fundraising goal, and this grassroots network has really gotten us off to a strong start!!

The Bad News: As of 8 a.m. this morning, we're still $18,642 behind! We need to hustle, or we'll risk coming up short.

If we don't hit this goal, we won't be able to continue reaching out to undecided voters on the ground.

We've come too far to let our momentum slow down before voters start making up their minds, team.

[It's crucial that we keep our campaign growing as we move to persuade undecided voters in crucial early states.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba910/134673f2/914c6c6/69978b67/241403219/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[We wouldn't ask if it wasn't urgent, team. name: Brittany Maloney
subject: This is the most important deadline since we entered the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:

name: Booker HQ
subject: It's time to flip the calendar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Pretty soon we'll flip our calendars to a brand new year. But before we do, we're taking some time to look back at 2019 and assess our campaign strategy so far. Team, Pretty soon we'll flip our calendars to a brand new year. But before we do, we're taking some time to look back at 2019 and assess our campaign strategy so far. **[We are entering a new phase of our campaign, and we want to hear from you before the new year.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cory-2020-reflection-survey?source=em_su_20191214_BHQ_20191214-su-BHQ-em1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** The Iowa caucuses are right around the corner, with New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina not far behind. Now is the time when many folks are going to make final decisions on whom to support. That's why we're reaching out to check in with our top supporters to see how what worked, and what didn't work, in 2019. Our team here at headquarters is starting to plan how to best approach 2020, but we want to hear from you first. **[Will you take our brand new official 2019 Reflection Survey? Click here to let us know how we did this past year.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cory-2020-reflection-survey?source=em_su_20191214_BHQ_20191214-su-BHQ-em1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l2_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This is the best way to have your input shared directly with Cory and our campaign. Thanks for sharing your thoughts,
Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cory-2020-reflection-survey?source=em_su_20191214_BHQ_20191214-su-BHQ-em1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_button_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c17/5fca0d19/7829f66b/291c9b13/1062540046/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c17/5fca0d19/7829f66b/291c9b12/1062540046/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c17/5fca0d19/7829f66b/291c9b11/1062540046/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c17/5fca0d19/7829f66b/291c9b10/1062540046/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c17/5fca0d19/7829f66b/291c9b1f/1062540046/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c17/5fca0d19/7829f66b/291c9b13/1062540046/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Sara 2020
subject: Mitch McConnell is promising to let Trump make the rules for his own impeachment trial.
body:
This is a direct quote:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fd8/4bef7a87/6a4fe63a/287fed98/1950475079/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
Majority Leader Mitch McConnell just said this about a potential impeachment trial in the Senate:
**_" Everything I do during this, I'm coordinating with the White House counsel. There will be no difference between the president's position and our position as to how to handle this."_
\- Mitch McConnell**
**[Rush $3 now to help Democrats take back the Senate and kick McConnell OUT!](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fd8/4bef7a87/6a4fe63a/287fed9f/1950475079/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTQtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191214-1-full")**
Party politics is all that matters to Mitch McConnell, and that's unacceptable. It's time to replace him as Majority Leader.
**[Rush a $3 contribution so we can win in Maine, take back the Senate for Democrats, and kick Mitch McConnell OUT!](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fd8/4bef7a87/6a4fe63a/287fed9f/1950475079/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTQtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191214-1-full")**
This is important,
\- Team Sara

Sara Gideon for Maine

South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Do you want a signed copy of my new book?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm reaching out because I personally want to make sure you get a signed copy of my new book.

Friend,

I'm reaching out because I personally want to make sure you get a signed copy of my new book.

When I worked alongside President Trump, as a member of his administration, I knew just how important it was to show American strength. I talk about those experiences working with the President and at the UN as Ambassador in my new book, _With All Due Respect._

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Lindsey Graham "wavers like the flag"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter \-- That's what one independent South Carolina voter had to say about reviled Senator Lindsey Graham in a recent _Washington Post_ article. Another lifelong GOP South Carolina voter said Graham had been "indoctrinated" by Trump with his bullying behavior. Honestly, we're just as sick and tired of Lindsey Graham as these SC voters are \-- he's done nothing these past few months but contort himself to defend Trump against the impeachment proceedings and help him push his hyper-partisan agenda. He's refused to read the transcripts of the House interviews, claiming they wouldn't change his mind anyways. He supported Trump's emergency declaration to build the wall on our southern border. And, he's continued to claim the FBI should not have investigated the Trump campaign for its contacts with Russia, even after the DOJ released a report refuting his claims. Lindsey Graham is up for re-election, but we think he shouldn't stick around to cause any more damage, so we're asking voters what they think about Lindsey Graham. We need 109 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Should Lindsey Graham resign?** [**YES**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf5f/6e9863e8/1731bb94/1db0b6b4/3502002782/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/MXD5njsk") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf5f/6e9863e8/1731bb94/1db0b6b4/3502002782/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/MXD5njsk") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf5f/6e9863e8/1731bb94/1db0b6b9/3502002782/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-jaime-nd?refcode=OUT20191214a.ND&refcode2=qe9rEm4pPAVduCMVr4Ft")

subject: pacing behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |

| Hey team -

Coming to you to ask for your help today.

**Here 's the situation:** We've got a major FEC deadline at the end of the month. This deadline marks the end of the first full quarter since Joe Kennedy got in this race.

**Our goal:** We want to generate as many individual donations as possible before the deadline. The number of donations is just as important as how much we raise. Each one sends a powerful message about our grassroots strength.

**Problem:** We're pacing behind where we need to be in order to maintain our strong position in this race. We cannot afford to fall short at this critical moment.

**That 's where you come in.** There's still time to get back on track to hit our fundraising goals, but we need to close the gap quickly. We need as many people as possible to step up right now to chip in whatever they can afford.

**[Can we count on you to make a donation of any amount today to help us reach our goal? Fundraising around the holidays can be difficult. That's why it's so important that we pick up the pace right now.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df3c/693b8b0a/438a706d/72de7f73/1175854960/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191214-full")**

Thank you in advance for chipping in!

\- Team Markey **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df3c/693b8b0a/438a706d/72de7f73/1175854960/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191214-full")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: This Iowa poll is incredible.
body:
Republicans are united. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523901?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [**IOWA POLL: "President Trump's Popularity Sky High Among Registered Republicans."**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=e1d53f35b3&e=90fad69796)
---
| | [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=31e2720ef5&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| Peter, An incredible poll was recently released that shows exactly why we are going to win in 2020.

The Des Moines Register just found that over 85% of Republicans approve of the job President Trump is doing and that over 75% of them will DEFINITELY vote to re-elect him in 2020.

But this quote about Trump from one of the poll respondents really stood out to me:

“I think he’s doing a tremendous job, really, as far as I’m concerned ... I’ve been a Democrat all my life, but when he ran for office, when I could see what he was standing up for — for the borders and the different solutions he brought forth — I felt that I definitely needed to vote for him."

Wow. This is exactly what I mean when I say this is a conservative district. Sure, it may have elected a Democrat to the House in 2018, but it voted for the president by over 5 points in 2016 and it was because voters knew that President Trump would fight for them.

Our Republican nominee from IA-02 in 2020 can win too, if they convince voters they're ready to fight for their values--like President Trump.

That's why I'm running for this seat. [**Please consider donating just $5, $25, $50, or $100 to our campaign so we can get our fighting message out to voters and deliver this district for conservatives in 2020.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=3ab10c0b25&e=90fad69796)

Thank you so much!

For Iowa,
[](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=bf357456b1&e=90fad69796)
Bobby Schilling
Conservative Republican
Candidate for Congress, IA-02

clean_body: Republicans are united. | | | | | | | "Donate Now ›" | Peter, An incredible poll was recently released that shows exactly why we are going to win in 2020. The Des Moines Register just found that over 85% of Republicans approve of the job President Trump is doing and that over 75% of them will DEFINITELY vote to re-elect him in 2020. But this quote about Trump from one of the poll respondents really stood out to me: “I think he’s doing a tremendous job, really, as far as I’m concerned ... I’ve been a Democrat all my life, but when he ran for office, when I could see what he was standing up for — for the borders and the different solutions he brought forth — I felt that I definitely needed to vote for him." Wow. This is exactly what I mean when I say this is a conservative district. Sure, it may have elected a Democrat to the House in 2018, but it voted for the president by over 5 points in 2016 and it was because voters knew that President Trump would fight for them. Our Republican nominee from IA-02 in 2020 can win too, if they convince voters they're ready to fight for their values--like President Trump. That's why I'm running for this seat. Thank you so much! For Iowa, Bobby Schilling Conservative Republican Candidate for Congress, IA-02 | | "Donate Now ›" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2019 Bobby for Iowa, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet?=
subject: Calling all patriots
body:
Here's one of the best ways for us to stand out in a crowded primary | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1d7c0d7acc51/calling-all-patriots-12094001?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8a12b98b37&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=999f5f212b&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [Volunteer for Janet](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8ea7b387fa&e=795c6d9796 "Volunteer for Janet")
---
| Peter,

I'm running to give the grassroots conservatives of Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District a voice in Washington.

I’ll defend our Second Amendment rights, and I will stand with President Trump to secure our borders because a strong nation must have strong borders. And I will be an unrelenting voice for the unborn, because by championing life we are defending every child’s right to reach their God-given potential.

[But I can't do it alone.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f1b6abd208&e=795c6d9796)

It's going to be a tough race, both in the primary and the general election. The only way we can make it across the finish line is if thousands of grassroots activists go the extra mile to help us get our message out: **Less Washington—more Oklahoma.**
---
| [Endorse Janet](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=de54afc340&e=795c6d9796 "Endorse Janet")
---
| National Journal said this is the **nation's #1 battleground district.**

You can help us fight back against the big money machine gearing up to keep the Nancy Pelosi rubber-stamp liberal currently in Congress by signing up to [volunteer with our campaign](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=3290ad79a3&e=795c6d9796). There are many ways you can get involved, from little things like joining our Online Action Team ([click Social Media](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=61d2b07d84&e=795c6d9796)) to block walking or phone banking.

One easy way to help us is by opting to "Endorse" us on our volunteer page. Doing so will help demonstrate the grassroots support behind our campaign to take back Oklahoma's 5th District.

Thank you for your support. Together we will win the primary, defeat liberal Democrat Kendra Horn, and bring conservative Oklahoma values to Washington.

For Oklahoma,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8c314c9bbe&e=795c6d9796)
Janet Barresi
---
| | [Volunteer for Janet](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=84a04f08d7&e=795c6d9796 "Volunteer for Janet")
---
|
---

Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147

name: Yang2020
subject: Slower than expected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Can you make a contribution?

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5) Yang Gang --

Andrew is rising in the polls, but right now our December grassroots donations are coming in slower than expected.

That’s why we’re coming to you, one of our most dedicated supporters, in this important moment. We must hit every goal if we want to send Andrew to the White House and take on the crisis we’re facing.

**[Yang Gang, will you make your first contribution of $5 so that Andrew can reach more Americans like you who are fighting for the change that will put Humanity First?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19734?t=5&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19734?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19734?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19734?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19734?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19734?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19734?t=8&amount=25&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5)
---
**Over 80% of our total fundraising comes from grassroots supporters giving what they can.** That’s the highest percentage of any candidate -- it’s truly a grassroots-funded campaign. That means when our grassroots donations fall short of goals, we have to cut back on our budget.

December is a critical time -- in two weeks our fundraising numbers will go public and everyone will see how strong this campaign is.

**[Can you make your first contribution of $5 so we can get back on track to hit our goal?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19734?t=7&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5)**
[Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19734?t=6&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5)
---
Counting on you,

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19734?t=14&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4727%2E377263%2Egy7-P5) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Why we can't wait until 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
2019 is almost over and you’ve been there for us every step of the way. We could not be more grateful for all of the donations and volunteer hours.. [ **Contribute to our End of Year fundraising campaign** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c49f5f4e52e1416f96ef782992755174&_e=HtNwfUCfDEM7pA3P1YjnCCdkUaU3rU5hmpg4fKxLwgFzFpFFjA7rH8XV_C_9-kRDf5W7fI9c2gzCvXQkyPeFlnc-I2APhyJd1SDMeyiDb5fnXLPwruadByXPSADCbYtPsPVuXUgT8T29BUYNVdBs9b6mM19V0ziwLA66xMeERo3t-ep2k-0brQoCWtmCXMxsutEzTd_7vcahSJQ4sZQRj4c9MyBWIJA4OHi4eGQ49-C7n8XfLriEcvXzxMnmAEX3nK6w3pbtXGwbm8wHX9gf4HCHPNAPTFAqfeknh8LvAks4R_rbdYM8T5Z2Jg1hP-fJ0Sjx93qQUp_DvSkA2zP0YT7StvpzSdqi2z6DOIpHamzecYZ6Ej5R4jj2IV3e_4aY5Vq1kLmVCEkOKi2JkX0l60AXdnZNB5wJmAkv6HFs9kQ%3D) | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c49f5f4e52e1416f96ef782992755174&_e=HtNwfUCfDEM7pA3P1YjnCCdkUaU3rU5hmpg4fKxLwgFzFpFFjA7rH8XV_C_9-kRDf5W7fI9c2gzCvXQkyPeFlnc-I2APhyJd1SDMeyiDb5fnXLPwruadByXPSADCbYtPsPVuXUgT8T29BUYNVdBs9b6mM19V0ziwLA66xMeERo3t-ep2k-0brQoCWtmCXMxsv8g6zdZ3wRRf_juA9JtCnMvlf6yUW9g3VG4M4ymzJrp8ahW_Fc5vGiRu8h_aS4GGI5qNAssZW85fVBk_AwSnbYxmLKhIMtbLCt6vxyv5r6FLd7XrNmxJfPiltr8o9yUT9ceBL75IB-5DAe4yAcFQmdypUSmq5B4KlbRAMX0u97nmTSa6OcO-cbk7fPXlrMZR_H1u6J6le0plFmkypwEgVMZIOenzuyLxUeZ9bIrOyRQ%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

2019 is almost over and you’ve been there for us every step of the way.

We could not be more grateful for all of the donations and volunteer hours that our grassroots community has given Governor Holcomb over the last year. Your support has been absolutely crucial to our success, but there’s still a long road ahead.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c49f5f4e52e1416f96ef782992755174&_e=HtNwfUCfDEM7pA3P1YjnCCdkUaU3rU5hmpg4fKxLwgFzFpFFjA7rH8XV_C_9-kRDf5W7fI9c2gzCvXQkyPeFlnc-I2APhyJd1SDMeyiDb5fnXLPwruadByXPSADCbYtPsPVuXUgT8T29BUYNVdBs9b6mM19V0ziwLA66xMeERo3t-ep2k-0brQoCWtmCXMxsLOZbPuYueJ1mGRWq_N5q7Pvz-Afs5LXM-H2FeZUO7hTnJp9FKzhety68PncgTBZhuyzfGIq-mTMceps-t6vZEtjEUXxDucQb5Kh4u-E1CnQjw3zDpxDE8PbcndsBZ5W18Dt7zeOQORSn-1pVDnEdrWqpV1iHWXo6ojRwrwzb9Cnd-LHex7zHe4t4ZqBn7CJOqkfMusghuHNfu3W2C41ISvJeLsk63B0i2SbvdxqhZyk%3D)
[ **Contribute to our End of Year fundraising campaign** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c49f5f4e52e1416f96ef782992755174&_e=HtNwfUCfDEM7pA3P1YjnCCdkUaU3rU5hmpg4fKxLwgFzFpFFjA7rH8XV_C_9-kRDf5W7fI9c2gzCvXQkyPeFlnc-I2APhyJd1SDMeyiDb5fnXLPwruadByXPSADCbYtPsPVuXUgT8T29BUYNVdBs9b6mM19V0ziwLA66xMeERo3t-ep2k-0brQoCWtmCXMxsvbVRH07uUQfZgWje_rzI-cF1xGURR04w-skn8w4at3ke-EbIaIj5Af1NtOt8I-lnrREOFlaJgOQaxrctn12r_ugK747hK68yTuEvwV3zjB8H3lYgPGyArg_kbjkGerWp_yr6OHN9WeGGvL5jfFd66U1YNC0LHC5X1A8hmBUzYkiIRGxTCnsDVAkXKB-pVawiUH8DLdR62x_tL95t7dLwdlBJ_lDgphVOGzV0K7XRcC4%3D)
_If we want to keep Putting People First and delivering for all Hoosiers in 2020 and beyond, we’re going to need our grassroots community in all 92 counties to be**all in** starting today — we can’t do this without you, and we can’t wait until next year to get started. _

That’s why we launched our **2019 End of Year Fundraising Campaign.** If you want to see Governor Holcomb hit the ground running in 2020, making a contribution to our campaign now will give us the critical resources we need.

We’re hitting the ground running into 2020, and we need the continued support of the Holcomb Crew. Consider making your contribution before midnight on New Year’s Eve.
[ **Make a difference before 2020** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c49f5f4e52e1416f96ef782992755174&_e=HtNwfUCfDEM7pA3P1YjnCCdkUaU3rU5hmpg4fKxLwgFzFpFFjA7rH8XV_C_9-kRDf5W7fI9c2gzCvXQkyPeFlnc-I2APhyJd1SDMeyiDb5fnXLPwruadByXPSADCbYtPsPVuXUgT8T29BUYNVdBs9b6mM19V0ziwLA66xMeERo3t-ep2k-0brQoCWtmCXMxssjlI37XyKsjQsKTNBi3AsU7DDVilCAXcUcC6TQxGUkGgb_x4t99Orwu5OlSoKRkiG6ENP2vbmCM8-qJlJ40AVp2Npzu1sfnfc5PrHNbV56gEIOvMeRdF6a1X4fPClvzGEZqbvBRj2Rfd4ZZKovbZspapvHbtmpiW_DFM_m_PK7f368M0sPFixKjTwB0ImDoPDgF9bbpyxq0ZTyt0wgVUhokZM-S50eFy4U8peYAumVk%3D)
Sincerely,

Holcomb Crew

body:

[_**Every top Democrat under the sun asked because hitting Ben Ray 's goal is MAKE OR BREAK to defeat McConnell's Senate! How's about you toss in $5 before tomorrow's end-of-week deadline to get the job done for Democrats? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191214_em_fr_b1_carville_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") Here's the deal: \-- McConnell could lose his seat -- and his whole freaking majority \-- Even _Fox News_ admits Mitch McConnell's approval is TANKING \-- But Democrats' chances are ZERO to defeat McConnell's Senate if we don't win New Mexico If we want to defeat McConnell's Senate, we MUST give Ben Ray our money NOW! He's got a gap to fill and 24 hours until his deadline to do it. Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7b3/18e32a7f/505834a7/7b22b922/2491588914/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

Hi,

Tomorrow marks the halfway point of this month. But right now, our fundraising progress is not halfway to our goal we need to hit by the end of the month.

**If 178 people reading this email from Pennsylvania respond with a donation, we'll head into the second half of the month in better shape.**

That means we'll be able to hire more organizers, knock on more doors, and have more face-to-face conversations with voters without having to worry if we'll have to scale back our efforts during such a critical time in this election. Because missing these goals means real consequences for our budget and our momentum heading into 2020.

[**Will you be one of the 178 from Pennsylvania? Please chip in before tomorrow's mid-month deadline to help this campaign keep fighting. Even $2 makes a big difference.**](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM59F_MMG_MCG_P_20191214_V1S1_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM59F_MMG_MCG_P_20191214_V1S1_P_T2)

What this team does today will determine the next few weeks of this campaign.

We can make big, structural change. We can make Washington work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. But it's going to take all of us -- from Cresco, from Pennsylvania, and across the country -- coming together and building this movement one day at a time.

**That's how we'll win in 2020. And when we do, we'll look back and know it's because grassroots donors chipped in during critical moments like this.**

name: Barbara Bollier
subject: I found a new home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Barbara Bollier for U
body:
I’ll tell you the whole story: My parents were moderate Republicans in the mold of Kansas Senator Nancy Kessebaum. They taught me that Republicanism | | | [](http://links.bollierforkansas.com/u/click?_t=9b0f889d9ec84544b5cf693bbcca79a1&_m=e85527b9bf7b4592b6bd381235ba9fd5&_e=sbEwR0j6bfbuZVxpqTlDqLBRk1SwV2pyg8IXSFdwxDjuyBGsUc9EaGSbJiwISRY_C7prxxcvNCEZoEfjMCTCvN61ocBvgm8C-6sjE4oUVvjpzetleD_Y2oJ2WMs9mhXjcwdbHBoeFwOADFWibxCQPbEoxCeFpaWDfhKq58MFMqRCM5oqOFi9rVzx9qBEYVl0MkIWUIh3ZBUxlTjpmE2mDMNj87vWCka1Zf_QbbSAI19tjzNtrbYUPV3e0ctogTtFZCqQQJM0GbY_ZoZtliBlFVmZw3glp13vXHJHoCakIq13rj_U9RfO79sHK0VbX-fOwVF86yArXQFOkSgwAwr3pdpzWN8ziI8F-z55HYJkzVr4j3SnCW0v6psQo4gm99rX3BxgqhSObkeOr01UCDjxFrOtBE5bYtzVL_lrxuKzSYWWhREgSdcdVMY-kmQ4y_vqiPZQDx0aRsu_rEF0yzTcaw%3D%3D) **One year ago this week, I changed my party registration and became a Democrat.** I’ll tell you the whole story: My parents were moderate Republicans in the mold of Kansas Senator Nancy Kassebaum. They taught me that Republicanism meant valuing public education, pursuing fiscal responsibility and supporting governments that are close to the people they govern. **I’ve always believed that all people deserve the same rights, no matter their race, gender or sexual orientation and women should be free to make their own reproductive choices -- with whoever they choose to consult.** Over time, I found the views of the Republican Party to be increasingly distant from my own. As a doctor, I advocated for commonsense solutions, not partisan politics. Meanwhile, the GOP rejected Medicaid expansion and comprehensive funding for public education. **It had become clear to me that my values and my approach were no longer welcome by the Kansas Republican Party leadership, so I left the party and found a new home.** A lot changed that day when I was welcomed with open arms by the Kansas Democratic Party -- I got a new desk in the Senate chamber and joined some new committees. My party registration may have changed, but my values did not. **I represent my constituents in Topeka the way I always have, and they have the same needs they’ve always had: affordable healthcare, quality public education and accessible child care.** I still work with the same colleagues and have the same relationships, on both sides of the aisle, as I always have. [**Now, I’m a Democrat and I’m running for the U.S. Senate to continue to serve Kansas families. In order to support my mission to bring commonsense leadership back to Washington, contribute to my campaign.**](http://links.bollierforkansas.com/u/click?_t=9b0f889d9ec84544b5cf693bbcca79a1&_m=e85527b9bf7b4592b6bd381235ba9fd5&_e=sbEwR0j6bfbuZVxpqTlDqLBRk1SwV2pyg8IXSFdwxDjuyBGsUc9EaGSbJiwISRY_C7prxxcvNCEZoEfjMCTCvN61ocBvgm8C-6sjE4oUVvjpzetleD_Y2oJ2WMs9mhXjcwdbHBoeFwOADFWibxCQPbEoxCeFpaWDfhKq58MFMqRCM5oqOFi9rVzx9qBEYVl0MkIWUIh3ZBUxlTjpmE2mDMNj87vWCka1Zf_QbbSAI19tjzNtrbYUPV3e0ctogTtFxHBqudtstmhEsILKV8lXFb3WUF13TJvL2wKXgt4mn0mm_ggJl5mG1S6iYToTuq8SJ46QxCmoTrmuTuMXh86Z8WFxhdFOyg_N1J-ot1qxWjMqxDYZWJ29k_xhlzyedECIg7XFla04geFdKiHA8LYAZgDLrm1o_2KnTZKEPiieH7tdDwkfuWvhUlxpBRGW68HNWqBdGrkJxqC4Wbl6kOhtzg%3D%3D) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | clean_body: I’ll tell you the whole story: My parents were moderate Republicans in the mold of Kansas Senator Nancy Kessebaum. They taught me that Republicanism | | | One year ago this week, I changed my party registration and became a Democrat. I’ll tell you the whole story: My parents were moderate Republicans in the mold of Kansas Senator Nancy Kassebaum. They taught me that Republicanism meant valuing public education, pursuing fiscal responsibility and supporting governments that are close to the people they govern. I’ve always believed that all people deserve the same rights, no matter their race, gender or sexual orientation and women should be free to make their own reproductive choices -- with whoever they choose to consult. Over time, I found the views of the Republican Party to be increasingly distant from my own. As a doctor, I advocated for commonsense solutions, not partisan politics. Meanwhile, the GOP rejected Medicaid expansion and comprehensive funding for public education. It had become clear to me that my values and my approach were no longer welcome by the Kansas Republican Party leadership, so I left the party and found a new home. A lot changed that day when I was welcomed with open arms by the Kansas Democratic Party -- I got a new desk in the Senate chamber and joined some new committees. My party registration may have changed, but my values did not. I represent my constituents in Topeka the way I always have, and they have the same needs they’ve always had: affordable healthcare, quality public education and accessible child care. I still work with the same colleagues and have the same relationships, on both sides of the aisle, as I always have. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | Red and blue must work together towards practical solutions based on scientific evidence and data, even in this deeply polarized era. I look forward to traveling the state and visiting with all Kansans regardless of their party affiliation. We have a bright future ahead of us. Together, we can make Kansas -- and America -- the best it can be. Now, let’s go win this race. Yours, Barbara Paid for by Barbara Bollier for U.S. Senate

name: Preston, Team MJ Hegar
subject: What Sen. Cornyn's allies are saying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn's buddies are worried, and they should be.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fa/7f51f7bc/4a6a94a3/4ef0ead6/1131521297/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter -- With our mid-month deadline coming up, **_and our last end-of-quarter deadline of the year just weeks away_** , I want to share what some in Washington have said about this race:
* Senator John Cornyn, MJ's opponent and 17-year senator, said that Texas is "**no longer the reliably red state we have been.** "
* Political operative Karl Rove said that "after reviewing the data [him]self," he thinks **Texas could turn blue in 2020.**
* And now Senator Ted Cruz is predicting "**staggering Democratic turnout** " in the 2020 election.

**Sen. Cornyn and his DC allies know he 's vulnerable! [Pitch in $5 or more now to help defeat him, and we'll send you a BRAND NEW MJ for Texas bumper sticker to say thank you!*](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fa/7f51f7bc/4a6a94a3/4ef0ead5/1131521297/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191214.2nd__635__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fa/7f51f7bc/4a6a94a3/4ef0ead5/1131521297/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191214.2nd__635__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Sen. Cornyn's buddies are worried, and they should be. Texans are tired of Washington insiders selling them out to the highest bidder, and folks are ready for change. But I've worked on a lot of campaigns, so I can tell you that their predictions will only come true if we MAKE them come true.

**And that 's exactly what we're trying to do on Team MJ -- but we can't do it without you. So will you chip in to prove them RIGHT and send a fiercely independent Texan to represent us in Washington?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fa/7f51f7bc/4a6a94a3/4ef0ead4/1131521297/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191214.2nd__635__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fa/7f51f7bc/4a6a94a3/4ef0eacb/1131521297/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191214.2nd__635__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fa/7f51f7bc/4a6a94a3/4ef0eaca/1131521297/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191214.2nd__635__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fa/7f51f7bc/4a6a94a3/4ef0eac9/1131521297/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191214.2nd__635__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fa/7f51f7bc/4a6a94a3/4ef0eac8/1131521297/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191214.2nd__635__")**
Your generous donation will be put right to work, doing things like:
* Helping MJ get across the huge state of Texas to talk to voters from El Paso to Houston and in between
* Laying the groundwork for a strong organizing program
* Paying for digital and TV ads that spread this campaign's message to every corner of the state

I'll be honest -- running a statewide campaign in Texas isn't cheap. But I know this team won't let us down.

**[Will you chip in now to help us build the campaign we need to defeat a nearly two-decade incumbent and send MJ to fight for us in Washington?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fa/7f51f7bc/4a6a94a3/4ef0ead5/1131521297/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191214.2nd__635__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

\-- Preston

clean_body: December is almost halfway over and we can’t stop thinking about our big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. How much we raise by December 31st will speak volumes about how serious our campaign is about winning. | | | Friend, December is almost halfway over and we can’t stop thinking about our big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. How much we raise by December 31st will speak volumes about how serious our campaign is about winning. Our team has been crunching the numbers and here’s where our fundraising numbers stand: We’re behind where we need to be, but if everyone pitches in today, we can catch up and get back on track. ** For too long, candidates have been willing to accept money from just about anybody if it means winning.It’s why Big Pharma, the NRA, and corporate interests pour billions into elections every year. And it’s why so many politicians support policies that work for big corporations but throw working families under the bus. We need leaders who put people, not donations, first. That’s why Mondaire made the bold choice to not accept any money from corporate PACs or special interests. He’s part of a new, progressive movement of leaders fighting to put people back at the center of our politics. But that means we’re leaning on our grassroots supporters to help out as much as they can to make sure our campaign has the resources to compete. **** ** Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: The answer to the gun violence epidemic:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c46c/6cd27893/52a5b60c/1587afa1/3287522490/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Seven years ago today, twenty first-graders and six teachers lost their lives in a mass shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School. As a dad, that day was excruciating. As a Senator, I have never forgotten that anguish. In the last seven years, little has changed. We've seen mass shootings become an epidemic in our nation. I have sat with Sandy Hook parents and mourned with them. And I have shared their immense frustration that Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, Republicans in Congress, and the NRA continue to block even the most modest common-sense efforts to address this crisis claiming our children. **Political problems require political solutions. And that's where you come in.** As long Mitch McConnell and the NRA maintain control of the U.S. Senate, _nothing_ will change. Time and again, they've made that absolutely clear. **The answer to gun violence in America is winning in 2020. Let us elect a Democratic majority in the Senate that will take on the NRA and enact real solutions to put a brake on the violence.** [**Donate before our year-end fundraising deadline. Let's make sure we flip the Senate.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c46c/6cd27893/52a5b60c/1587afde/3287522490/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-12-14-sandyop&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") It's time to get to work. **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c46c/6cd27893/52a5b60c/1587afdf/3287522490/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-12-14-sandyop&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c46c/6cd27893/52a5b60c/1587afdc/3287522490/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-12-14-sandyop&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c46c/6cd27893/52a5b60c/1587afdd/3287522490/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-12-14-sandyop&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c46c/6cd27893/52a5b60c/1587afda/3287522490/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-12-14-sandyop&refcode2=express-buttons")
