Email is an important way for Senator Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c46c/6cd27893/52a5b60c/1587afd9/3287522490/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you no longer want to hear from Senator Merkley, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c46c/6cd27893/52a5b60c/1587afd6/3287522490/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [Contact us here.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c46c/6cd27893/52a5b60c/1587afd7/3287522490/VEsHBA/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/contact/") |
clean_body: | "" | | Seven years ago today, twenty first-graders and six teachers lost their lives in a mass shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School. As a dad, that day was excruciating. As a Senator, I have never forgotten that anguish. In the last seven years, little has changed. We've seen mass shootings become an epidemic in our nation. I have sat with Sandy Hook parents and mourned with them. And I have shared their immense frustration that Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, Republicans in Congress, and the NRA continue to block even the most modest common-sense efforts to address this crisis claiming our children. Political problems require political solutions. And that's where you come in. As long Mitch McConnell and the NRA maintain control of the U.S. Senate, nothing will change. Time and again, they've made that absolutely clear. The answer to gun violence in America is winning in 2020. Let us elect a Democratic majority in the Senate that will take on the NRA and enact real solutions to put a brake on the violence. "" It's time to get to work. Jeff Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. ---|--- | ""

name: Mike Franken
subject: articles of impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
This week the House of Representatives issued articles of impeachment against the president. The reputation of our nation and the rule of law are too important not to investigate this unfortunate situ
|
---
| |
---

| | Friends: This week the House of Representatives issued articles of impeachment against the President. The reputation of our nation and the rule of law are too important not to proceed with this unfortunate situation. I want to believe that this is not about President Trump, but more exactly the abuse of elected office. The facts appear clear -- the President asked a foreign leader for a personal favor and then acted to cover up the ask. This is illegal on two counts. The question now becomes whether this is grounds for removal from office. Political leaders, like leaders in the military, must often take the unpleasant path of standing alone, being out-front in upholding standards; and it's about honesty. **I 'm ready to be that leader for Iowa and hold our country and its leaders -- executive, military, judicial, or congressional -- to the highest standard. But I need your help to become the next Senator for our great state. [Can you chip in $15 to help us win? ](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242c/33365068/4a62e19f/3f8b9314/127514838/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191214_em_fr_all_articles_L1&amount=15")** | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242c/33365068/4a62e19f/3f8b9315/127514838/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191214_em_fr_all_articles_btn1&amount=15")
---
I'm going to Washington to make sure our country and its leaders act lawfully for the good of Iowans and every American.
**But I can 't do it alone. It takes a team of proud, moral citizens to stand up and create change.** **[Click here and join our team with a quick donation.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242c/33365068/4a62e19f/3f8b9316/127514838/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191214_em_fr_all_articles_L2&amount=15")**

Mike Franken USN VADM

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8b7/3eb3e2fc/6904f31b/744eeffb/1202342820/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=20191214_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191214_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump mocks Greta Thunberg on Twitter for being better than him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Greta Thunberg, youth climate crisis activist, was just named TIME's 2019 Person of the Year. She has risen to prominence for her outspoken criticism of world leaders and their empty words on combating climate change. She's the champion of the environment for the modern age, so naturally, Trump had to respond. And respond he did, in his classic fashion, taking to Twitter to voice his discontent with the fact that his critics are getting more praise than he is. (As a reminder, he's never been named Person of the Year and even hung a fake TIME cover at his resort.) Trump even resorted to sexist rhetoric, telling Greta that she needs to "Chill" and work on her anger management, even though he's the one lashing out at someone and constantly throwing tantrums over minor inconveniences. Trump regularly uses Twitter to go after his critics, especially when he's backed into a corner and knows he's losing. This is only the tip of the iceberg of his awful behavior, and we know that as the 2020 election approaches, he's going to be even worse. We're investigating what engaged voters think about this issue and need 136 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Is Trump a bully?** [**YES**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf41/6e9863e8/1733c434/1db0b681/3053878354/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/P_vOfooV") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf41/6e9863e8/1733c434/1db0b681/3053878354/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/P_vOfooV") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf41/6e9863e8/1733c434/1db0b680/3053878354/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191214b.ND&refcode2=qhXnSTkFjJDVAU3w1OPR")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

name: James Mackler
subject: re: Your thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
I want to hear them ->
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1dd/18d6a294/4cd72b69/26d6317a/4254373395/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | There's no doubt about it -- there are big challenges facing us as a country. Throughout this race, I've sat down and had important conversations with Tennesseans all over the state about the issues facing us: health care, infrastructure, the economy. And this is what I've heard: Tennesseans are sick of politics-as-usual in Washington. They're sick of the partisan bickering, and they're sick of leaders who don't get anything done. I want to change the way things are done in Washington, and that's why I want to have another important conversation now -- _with you._ [_**Will you take a moment to complete our survey and share what issues you want Congress to address? Whatever those issues are, I want to hear them.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1dd/18d6a294/4cd72b69/26d6317b/4254373395/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e191213_a") Looking forward to hearing from you, James
---

subject: Sign Mark's birthday card!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Today is Senator Warner's birthday, and we're trying to get all of his friends and supporters to sign his birthday card.
|
---
| | Derek,

We'll keep this quick. Tomorrow is Senator Warner's birthday, and we're trying to get all of his friends and supporters to sign his birthday card.

Will you sign your name and wish him a happy birthday? | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72a/53d9897e/539acc90/1c89fb73/2400988541/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-birthday")
---
Sen. Warner has been working hard to make sure Virginia Democrats continue their momentum into 2020. But for now, we just want to take a moment to say thanks and wish him a happy birthday.

We know he'll appreciate hearing from you.

-- Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72a/53d9897e/539acc90/1c89fb72/2400988541/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191214_p_1_fl__387__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72a/53d9897e/539acc90/1c89fb71/2400988541/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

subject: Nate Silver: Bennet in Top 6 Based on Primary Election Fundamentals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team -

FiveThirtyEight's Nate Silver released a list of Democratic primary candidate rankings based on a new criteria: endorsements, fundraising, and experience.

Unlike the arbitrary DNC qualifications--such as number of online donors that can be bought on Facebook--these criteria paint a different picture, **_placing Bennet sixth among the 15 candidates:_**

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba90b/134673f2/9174157/69978ca0/3063415655/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| | | [CHIP IN TO ELECT MICHAEL BENNET >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba90b/134673f2/9174157/69978ca7/3063415655/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121419_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Team - President Obama is ALL-IN to elect Democrats in 2020 - and he's calling on grassroots Democrats to join the fight now. (Not tomorrow, not next year, NOW.)

**But we 're panicking because... Democrats aren't donating!**
We know that if we don't invest now, we'll blow our chances in key races. **That 's why a group of fired-up donors just offered to MATCH every gift to help Democrats win up and down the ballot! **
This match only lasts until our mid-month deadline, so we have to take advantage. We need to reach our $25,000 mid-month goal by midnight tomorrow, or we'll be leaving Democratic campaigns without the resources they need to win. **Can we count on you to answer President Obama 's call and give?**
**[Give now to stand with President Obama and every $1 you give will become $4 to elect Democrats up and down the ballot and STOP Trump:](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY3MTg1OTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDk4MzQ1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

subject: 2016 vs. 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We need your help to make sure Donald Trump doesn't squeak by in Minnesota and secure another four years in the White House.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-trump?refcode=em191214-trump&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") **Trump Campaign: Minnesota, New Mexico in Play for 2020 -- Dems Have No Idea 'What Is About to Hit Them'** **Rush an urgent donation now to make sure Donald Trump doesn't win Minnesota and the White House next year >>** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-trump?refcode=em191214-trump&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-trump?refcode=em191214-trump&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

* * *

Donald Trump lost Minnesota by just 1.5 percentage points in 2016. Now, his team is going all-in on the 2020 race to make sure they turn our state red this time around. How do we know this?

Reports say Trump's team in Minnesota will increase in size over the next few weeks. Both Trump and Pence will return to our state to shore up their base. And the Trump Victory team is already helping out our opponent, Jason Lewis.

That's why Tina needs your help to make sure Trump doesn't squeak by in Minnesota and secure another four years in the White House. Not next week, or next month -- we need your help _today_.

**Can Tina count on you to donate $10 (or more!) to support our campaign before the biggest FEC deadline of the year? Your contribution would fuel our work on the ground to make sure we keep Minnesota blue.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-trump?refcode=em191214-trump&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-trump?refcode=em191214-trump&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-trump?refcode=em191214-trump&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-trump?refcode=em191214-trump&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-trump?refcode=em191214-trump&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-trump?refcode=em191214-trump&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Republicans won big in the Midwest in 2016 with the help of powerful special interests at their side, but we're not going to let it happen this time -- and we're not going to let them claim victory in Minnesota -- not as long as Tina can count on this grassroots team to put up a fight.

[**You are our only chance to make sure the right-wing plan for Minnesota fails. Rush $10 toward our FEC goal now to support Tina and make sure Trump and Republicans can't pull this off >>**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-trump?refcode=em191214-trump&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")

Look, Minnesota could be a bellwether for the rest of the country next year, which means we only have one shot to get this right.

If we're going to avoid repeating the razor-thin margin from 2016, we must be prepared. We cannot afford to let ourselves be surprised at the last minute. That's why your donation matters so much today.

Thanks for everything.

-- Team Tina

subject: Why this goal is so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8b8/3eb3e2fc/6909a0d3/744eeedd/3091009785/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191214_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191214_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8b8/3eb3e2fc/6909a0d3/744eeedc/3091009785/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191214_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191214_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8b8/3eb3e2fc/6909a0d3/744eeedb/3091009785/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=20191214_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191214_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Roger Lau
subject: Can you join me for a special call on Monday night?

body:
I wanted to take the time to personally share some of our accomplishments over the past year and discuss our path to victory as we head into the final stages of the primary... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b259/45c30650/11393a5ff/66fb4a63/2516464774/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Do you have a sec?

We're just over 50 days from the Iowa Caucus, and I'm incredibly excited about what we have planned for the road ahead.

We've built an incredible movement over the past year, and we couldn't have done it without you. Thank you.

I wanted to take the time to personally share some of our accomplishments over the past year and discuss our path to victory as we head into the final stages of the primary. **That's why I'll be hosting a special Team Warren Supporter Call. And I would love to have you join me.**

[**I'm so thrilled to be able to speak with you all about what's in store for our campaign. Click here to RSVP for our special Supporter Call on Monday night at 9PM ET -- we'll follow up with a reminder to dial in. **](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b259/45c30650/11393a5ff/66fb4a62/2516464774/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU02MU9fTk9BX1NUUl9SXzIwMTkxMjE0X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/roger-supportercall-rsvp?source=EMM61O_NOA_STR_R_20191214_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

| [ **RSVP TODAY**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b259/45c30650/11393a5ff/66fb4a62/2516464774/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU02MU9fTk9BX1NUUl9SXzIwMTkxMjE0X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/roger-supportercall-rsvp?source=EMM61O_NOA_STR_R_20191214_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

I'm so excited to be able to speak with the team. Because if we're going to win in 2020 and bring big, structural change in 2021, it's going to take a grassroots movement -- and you're at the heart of our movement.

See you on the road -roger

Roger Lau
Campaign Manager
Warren for President
